name: v-secure-review-studio
description: Premium collaborative video review studio for V-Secure hackathon demos.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix client run dev" "npm --prefix server run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build
